metadata.title: decode9 — Jorge Bastidas · Senior Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Senior full stack developer with 10+ years building scalable architecture, automation systems, and production MVPs for founders and product teams.

hero.title: I build scalable software, automation, and MVPs that move businesses faster.
hero.sub: I'm Jorge Bastidas — decode9. For 10+ years I've shipped scalable architectures, automation systems, and production-ready products for founders, SaaS teams, and companies that need senior engineering they can trust.

console.title: decode9 — build console
console.line2: › build ok · tests passed · scan clean

about.title: A senior engineer who ships.
about.p1: I'm Jorge Bastidas, the engineer behind decode9. Since 2014 I've designed and built software across the entire stack — from the database and infrastructure underneath to the interface founders demo to investors.
about.p2: I work as a hands-on technical partner, not just a pair of hands. I can architect a system, build the MVP, automate the operations around it, and stay accountable for what ships. That means clear communication, senior judgment on the trade-offs that matter, and fast, reliable execution.
about.p3: Whether you're a founder validating an idea, a SaaS team scaling under load, or a business drowning in manual process, the goal is the same: turn complexity into a system that works — and keep it working.

svc.title: From idea to production — engineered end to end.
svc.sub: Senior capability across the full lifecycle. Pick a single service or a complete technical partnership.

fullstack.d: End-to-end product engineering across frontend, backend, and data — one partner accountable for the whole system.
fullstack.out: One owner for the entire stack.

mvp.d: Validated, production-ready MVPs built to demo, raise, and grow — not throwaway prototypes you'll rewrite.

auto.d: Automate manual operations and connect the tools your business runs on, with reliable, observable pipelines.
auto.out: Hours of manual work removed weekly.

arch.d: Systems designed to grow — clean service boundaries, queues, and data models that hold under real load.

ai.d: LLM-powered features and AI-enabled workflows built into real products — measured, guarded, and shipped.

devops.d: Containerized, observable infrastructure with CI/CD you can trust — repeatable, reliable, boring in the best way.

consult.d: CTO-level guidance on architecture, technical strategy, and hiring — senior judgment when the decision matters.
consult.out: The right call, the first time.

proc.d: Map, streamline, and automate the processes behind your operation — less overhead, more throughput.

stack.title: A stack built for production.
stack.sub: Battle-tested tools chosen for reliability and scale — not novelty.

code.title: Solutions to common web problems.
code.sub: A few patterns I reach for again and again — small, production-tested building blocks for resilience, performance, and UX.

c3.d: Update UI before the server replies

work.title: Real products, real impact.
work.sub: A selection of client work — from consumer apps to enterprise systems.

desc.yujju: A full e-commerce platform with product catalogue, checkout, payments, and multi-vendor order management — built to handle real transaction volume.
desc.finami: A personal finance management app for mobile — budgeting, expense tracking, and financial goal-setting with a clean, intuitive experience.
desc.gg: A digital platform for a recycling and sustainability operation — bringing process, tracking, and reporting into one system.
desc.avianca: An internal workforce management system for an enterprise airline operation — built for scale, control, and reliability.

proc.title: Product-minded engineering, not just code.
proc.sub: A clear path from problem to a running product you can defend.

s1.d: Understand the goal, constraints, and what success really means.

s2.d: Design a system that fits the problem and is built to grow.

s3.d: Ship clean, tested, production-grade code in tight iterations.

s4.d: Remove manual work with reliable pipelines and integrations.

s5.d: Deploy with CI/CD, monitoring, and confidence — no drama.

s6.d: Measure, refine, and keep the system working as you scale.

cta.title: Have an idea, product, or process to automate?
cta.sub: Tell me what you're building. I'll tell you the fastest, most reliable way to ship it — and how I'd help.

contact.title: Let's build something solid.
contact.sub: The best projects start with a direct conversation. Email me with what you're working on — I read and reply to every message.

footer.tagline: Senior full stack engineering, automation, and MVP development. Built by Jorge Bastidas since 2014.
